---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for MiniMax Content Studio
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What are you trying to do that you can't currently?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see added or changed? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Are there other ways to solve this problem? What are the trade-offs?

## Context

- Which part of the app is this related to? (e.g., Thumbnail Generator, Pipeline Builder, Assets)
- Is this related to a MiniMax API capability?
- Would you be willing to contribute this yourself?

## Additional context

Any mockups, references, or examples that might help illustrate the idea.
